methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 24 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
Bohr Systems is a pre-seed stage company in the Defense & Security sector. The comparable universe comprises 2 public peers (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private peers, including Anduril Industries, Saronic, Flock Safety, Shield AI, and Chaos Industries. Together these 10 comps span the broader sector landscape, though narrow peer clustering at the pre-seed stage is limited.

Peer-median valuation proved inapplicable for this analysis. The Defense & Security sector contains 24 same-sector peers overall, but filtering by stage (pre-seed), adjacent stage, and valuation tier yielded fewer than 3 datapoints in each narrow cohort—below the threshold required for reliable median triangulation. Attempting an all-sector median would introduce material distortion given the heterogeneity of defense technology valuations. No alternative quantitative methods (revenue multiple, DCF, or venture-backed precedent) were supported by provided financial metrics.

Without sufficient same-stage comparables and quantifiable operational data for Bohr Systems, this analysis cannot produce a defensible valuation range. A credible estimate would require either: (1) expanded pre-seed Defense & Security comps meeting minimum n≥3; (2) disclosed revenue, burn rate, or funding history for the target; or (3) application of venture-stage frameworks (e.g., Berkus method inputs). The key uncertainty is whether Bohr's technical or market position aligns closer to the Anduril/Shield AI tier or earlier-stage sub-$10M companies. Further diligence on these dimensions is prerequisite to valuation synthesis.
